name: English Learning Assistant

releases.author: liuba1223
releases.description:
Fix Obsidian community submission metadata.

- Rename plugin to English Learning Assistant.
- Change plugin ID to english-learning-assistant to comply with manifest guidelines.
- Update plugin resource paths and bundled assets.

releases.author: liuba1223
releases.description:
## English

Lightweight GitHub release for English Assistant.

This package does not bundle `ecdict.csv`. If you want offline dictionary lookup, download `ecdict.csv`, `ecdict.mini.csv`, or another ECDICT-compatible CSV and place it at `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-english-assistant/resources/ecdict.csv`.

Dictionary sources:
- Official repository: https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT
- Full CSV: https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/blob/master/ecdict.csv
- Mini CSV: https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/blob/master/ecdict.mini.csv
- Releases: https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/releases

## 中文

这是 English Assistant 的轻量 GitHub 发布包。

这个包不再附带 `ecdict.csv`。如果你需要离线查词，请单独下载 `ecdict.csv`、`ecdict.mini.csv` 或其他兼容 ECDICT 格式的 CSV 文件，然后放到 `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-english-assistant/resources/ecdict.csv`。

词典下载地址：
- 官方仓库：https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT
- 完整版 CSV：https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/blob/master/ecdict.csv
- 精简版 CSV：https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/blob/master/ecdict.mini.csv
- Releases 页面：https://github.com/skywind3000/ECDICT/releases

## Assets

- `obsidian-english-assistant-v2.2.0.zip`: lightweight manual install package
- `obsidian-english-assistant-v2.2.0.zip.sha256`: checksum
releases.name: v2.2.0
